title.en: China-to-US Cosmetics Compliance Gap Matrix (FDA / MoCRA)
title.zh: 中国化妆品进入美国市场：合规差距矩阵（FDA / MoCRA）
title.zht: 中國化妝品進入美國市場：合規差距矩陣（FDA / MoCRA）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China cosmetics documentation against US FDA and MoCRA requirements, covering facility registration, cosmetic product listing, safety substantiation, adverse event reporting, GMP, prohibited and restricted ingredients, color additive pre-approval, labelling, and special categories (sunscreens as OTC drugs).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国化妆品文件与美国FDA及MoCRA要求差距对照，涵盖设施注册、产品清单、安全实质性证明、不良事件报告、GMP、禁用及限用成分、色素添加剂预批准、标签，以及特殊类别（防晒产品作为OTC药品）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國化妝品文件與美國FDA及MoCRA要求差距對照，涵蓋設施登記、產品清單、安全實質性證明、不良事件報告、GMP、禁用及限用成分、色素添加劑預批准、標籤，以及特殊類別（防曬產品作為OTC藥品）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a legal opinion, regulatory determination, FDA compliance certification, import clearance decision, or market-access approval. Cosmetics, sunscreens, and personal care products are subject to complex and evolving US federal and state law. Exporters, importers, brand owners, and responsible persons should verify current FDA requirements, MoCRA rulemaking status, OTC drug monograph applicability, and state-level regulations with qualified US regulatory counsel and compliance professionals before manufacturing, importing, distributing, or selling products in the United States.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成法律意见、监管裁定、FDA合规认证、进口清关决定或市场准入批准。化妆品、防晒产品及个人护理品受复杂且持续演变的美国联邦和州法律约束。出口商、进口商、品牌所有者及责任人在美国境内制造、进口、分销或销售产品前，应与合格的美国法规律师及合规专业人士核验现行FDA要求、MoCRA法规制定进度、OTC药品专论适用性及州级法规。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成法律意見、監管裁定、FDA合規認證、進口清關決定或市場准入批准。化妝品、防曬產品及個人護理品受複雜且持續演變的美國聯邦和州法律約束。出口商、進口商、品牌所有者及責任人在美國境內製造、進口、分銷或銷售產品前，應與合格的美國法規律師及合規專業人士核驗現行FDA要求、MoCRA法規制定進度、OTC藥品專論適用性及州級法規。

answer_first.en: MoCRA facility registration, product listing, safety substantiation, and adverse event reporting are the core new US obligations; sunscreen reformulation (OTC drug, not cosmetic) and color additive pre-approval under 21 CFR 73/74 are the highest-risk gaps for Chinese cosmetics entering the US market.
answer_first.zh: MoCRA设施注册、产品清单、安全实质性证明及不良事件报告是美国核心新义务；防晒产品重新配方（OTC药品而非化妆品）及21 CFR 73/74下的色素添加剂预批准，是中国化妆品进入美国市场风险最高的差距。
answer_first.zht: MoCRA設施登記、產品清單、安全實質性證明及不良事件報告是美國核心新義務；防曬產品重新配方（OTC藥品而非化妝品）及21 CFR 73/74下的色素添加劑預批准，是中國化妝品進入美國市場風險最高的差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official US federal regulator (fda.gov, ecfr.gov, federalregister.gov, govinfo.gov), NMPA, or primary statutory source preferred. No invented URLs.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. MoCRA-pending rows must be flagged as PENDING in mandatory_status.

q.en: Is FDA pre-market approval required to sell cosmetics in the US?
q.zh: 在美国销售化妆品是否需要FDA上市前批准？
q.zht: 在美國銷售化妝品是否需要FDA上市前批准？

a.en: No pre-market approval is generally required for cosmetics. However, under the Modernization of Cosmetics Regulation Act of 2022 (MoCRA), facility registration and product listing with FDA are now mandatory. Color additives and sunscreens (classified as OTC drugs, not cosmetics) require separate FDA pre-approval before US market entry.
a.zh: 化妆品通常不需要上市前批准。但依据《2022年化妆品监管现代化法》（MoCRA），向FDA进行设施注册和产品清单申报现已成为强制要求。色素添加剂和防晒产品（被归类为OTC药品而非化妆品）在进入美国市场前须取得独立的FDA预批准。
a.zht: 化妝品通常不需要上市前批准。但依據《2022年化妝品監管現代化法》（MoCRA），向FDA進行設施登記和產品清單申報現已成為強制要求。色素添加劑和防曬產品（被歸類為OTC藥品而非化妝品）在進入美國市場前須取得獨立的FDA預批准。

q.en: Which US regulation now requires cosmetic facility registration, and who must register?
q.zh: 哪项美国法规现在要求化妆品设施注册？谁须进行注册？
q.zht: 哪項美國法規現在要求化妝品設施登記？誰須進行登記？

a.en: The Modernization of Cosmetics Regulation Act of 2022 (MoCRA) amended the FD&C Act to require every facility that manufactures or processes cosmetic products for US distribution to register with FDA. Chinese manufacturers that produce cosmetics destined for the US market must register their facility and submit product listings, regardless of whether they have a US distributor.
a.zh: 《2022年化妆品监管现代化法》（MoCRA）修订了《联邦食品、药品和化妆品法》，要求每个为美国市场制造或加工化妆品的设施向FDA进行注册。为美国市场生产化妆品的中国制造商须进行设施注册并提交产品清单，无论其是否有美国经销商。
a.zht: 《2022年化妝品監管現代化法》（MoCRA）修訂了《聯邦食品、藥品和化妝品法》，要求每個為美國市場製造或加工化妝品的設施向FDA進行登記。為美國市場生產化妝品的中國製造商須進行設施登記並提交產品清單，無論其是否有美國經銷商。

q.en: Are sunscreen products regulated as cosmetics or drugs in the US?
q.zh: 防晒产品在美国被归类为化妆品还是药品？
q.zht: 防曬產品在美國被歸類為化妝品還是藥品？

a.en: Sunscreen products are regulated as over-the-counter (OTC) drug products in the United States, not as cosmetics. They must comply with FDA OTC drug monograph requirements (currently under the CARES Act administrative order system) and are subject to drug facility registration, NDA/ANDA, or the OTC monograph process — separate from MoCRA cosmetic rules.
a.zh: 防晒产品在美国被归类为非处方（OTC）药品，而非化妆品。须符合FDA OTC药品专论要求（目前依据《CARES法》行政令体系执行），并须遵守药品设施注册、NDA/ANDA或OTC专论流程——与MoCRA化妆品规定分开适用。
a.zht: 防曬產品在美國被歸類為非處方（OTC）藥品，而非化妝品。須符合FDA OTC藥品專論要求（目前依據《CARES法》行政令體系執行），並須遵守藥品設施登記、NDA/ANDA或OTC專論流程——與MoCRA化妝品規定分開適用。
